caption: I don't remember everything we talked about. I remember how I felt.

See fine girl Goddd. I swear idk how you manage to talk down on yourself everytime when you’re literally the best visual artwork I’ve seen and I’m lucky to have you to myself. you should really see yourself through my eyes.
The day you went home on break, I missed you so much that i would jump through the phone to see you if i could… but still it wasn’t long before we saw again.
Meeting you was the best lcuk of my life. I’m so glad we met and I hope we continue to make more memories together.
